title: Glyph project config
description: Consumer-side glyph.json. Lives at the root of a project that uses glyph components. Written by `glyph init` and read by `glyph add` and `glyph list`.

frame.description: TUI framework. v0.1 supports bubbletea only. Other values are reserved for adapter packs.

module.description: Go module path of the consuming project (e.g. 'github.com/me/myapp'). Used to rewrite imports inside copied component files so they reference the consumer's module, not glyph's.

additionalProperties.description: Repo-relative directory path. Forbids leading or trailing slashes and forbids whitespace.

theme.description: Directory for `@theme/...` targets. Reserved for adapter packs that ship a separate theme directory; v0.1 components install their theme under the components alias.

aliases.description: Map of alias-name to repo-relative directory. A registry item's `target` value (`@alias/path`) resolves against this map. The `components` and `lib` aliases are required because `glyph init` materializes both directories on first run.

registry.description: Override for the registry base URL. Defaults to https://truffleagent.com/glyph/r when omitted.
